content: I am Rohan Verma. I was employed by Mr. Mehta from June 2023 to September 2023. I was fired falsely for stealing a phone that was never mine. Since then, I have been shunned by the community. I did not go to the Mehta house on March 15. I was at home in Kharar all evening. I was watching TV and eating dinner. My landlord, Mr. Singh, saw me at 8:00 PM and 9:30 PM. I did not leave my room. I don’t know how my fingerprint got on the drawer. I never touched it after I was fired. The cap? Maybe someone planted it. I didn’t wear a cap that day. I don’t own a black cotton cap.
